ul.li: Privilege Change: CPU loads ESP0/SS0 from TSS before pushing SS:ESP.
No Privilege Change: SS:ESP are NOT pushed by hardware.
Error Codes: Pushed for vectors 8, 10-14, 17. ISR must add esp, 4 before iret.
pusha: Pushes EAX, ECX, EDX, EBX, ESP, EBP, ESI, EDI (stack grows down).

div.p: Color Key: 🟡 Ring Transition State 🟢 Standard Hardware Context 🔴 Exception Data 🟣 Segment Registers 🔵 General Purpose Registers
